name: jetbrains-router
description: Routes Claude Code's Read/Grep/Glob/Edit/Write/Bash through a JetBrains IDE MCP server (WebStorm, Rider, IntelliJ IDEA). Primary wins: get_file_problems replaces local tsc/gradle/mypy runs for diagnostics, the project index narrows searches past ignored paths, and reads reflect the editor's in-memory buffer (including unsaved changes). Fails open when no IDE is connected.
